name: MAC-10 | 板条箱
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. It has been hand painted to resemble the green metal crates originally found on de_dust2. Rush B, don't stop
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 这把武器使用了自定义涂装。外表像极了经典版本炙热沙城2地图上的绿色金属板条箱。 Rush B, 不要停！
